Designed to help you think clearly.

LUME is a smart desk object that uses light and subtle feedback to help you stay focused, manage time, and work with intention, without pulling your attention away.

Start your focus session See how it works

Adaptive Ambient Light

Automatically adjusts brightness and warmth based on your time of day and focus mode.

No Screens. No Noise.

LUME communicates through light alone, keeping your attention exactly where it should be.

Built-in Focus Cycles

Guides deep work and mindful breaks using gentle light shifts; no alarms, no stress.

Touch to Control

Tap, hold, or rotate to start sessions, pause, or adjust intensity—intuitively.

Distraction is everywhere.

Notifications pull you away. Screens demand attention. Your focus fragments into dozens of shallow moments instead of one deep session.

LUME brings you back to what matters.

Simple by design

How LUME works

01

Place on your desk

LUME sits quietly beside you, waiting. No setup, no accounts, no configuration.

02

Touch to begin

A gentle tap starts your focus session. Light shifts to signal your intention to the space around you.

03

Stay present

LUME guides your rhythm—focused blocks, mindful breaks. All through light, never interrupting.

Adaptive technology

Light that understands context.

LUME reads the room. Morning brightness to evening warmth. Focus mode intensity to break time softness. Every adjustment happens naturally, keeping you in flow without a single setting to configure.

slide-in-right">
Built-in rhythm

Work in cycles, not marathons.

Deep focus requires natural rhythm. LUME guides 25-minute work blocks followed by 5-minute breaks. Gentle light shifts mark transitions—no alarms, no stress, just intuitive flow from one state to the next.

Designed for calm

Communication without distraction.

No screens to check. No notifications to dismiss. LUME uses pure light—a language your mind understands without thinking. You stay present in your work while remaining gently aware of time and rhythm.

slide-in-right">
Intuitive interaction

Touch. Rotate. Focus.

Control happens in your hands, not on a screen. Tap to start or pause. Rotate to adjust intensity. Every interaction is immediate and tactile, keeping you connected to the physical moment rather than lost in menus.

Made for focused work.

Whether you're writing, coding, studying, or creating—LUME creates the conditions for deep work.

Deep work

Extended focus sessions for complex problems. Writing, coding, analysis—work that demands your full attention.

Studying

Structured learning blocks with built-in breaks. Stay sharp through long study sessions without burning out.

Creative work

Design, music, art—creative flow that needs uninterrupted time. LUME protects your creative state.

Simple pricing

No subscriptions. No tiers. Just LUME.
